Home

About Mexico

Mexico is a federal republic in North America. The U.S. Embassy is in Mexico City.

Travel Requirements

  • Passport valid at entry.
  • No visa required for tourism under 180 days.

Local Laws & Special Circumstances

Penalties for possession of drugs are severe. Carry ID at all times.

Popular Links

  • Enroll in STEP

An official website of the U.S. government.
